svg.title: CareOS Healthcare Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing user input flowing through a master orchestrator to five specialized sub-agents, supported by memory and data layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the CareOS healthcare system?')
sendPrompt('What does the master orchestrator agent do in the CareOS healthcare system?')
g.text: Understands intent · Picks sub-agents · Merges results
